summary: A high‑quality recording captures an unforgettable, excellent show.
review: The reviewer hails this as an outstanding recording of a stellar concert, noting the cold weather but still describing the performance as “unforgettable.” No technical flaws are mentioned, and the overall experience is praised highly.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review; it praises both the performance and the recording without noting any flaws, suggesting a top‑tier show and very good audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording excellent and thanks for it; no specific comments about clarity, mix or issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed set‑list commentary, but overall experience described as unforgettable and excellent.
